export function getAiToolDockTools({ specialistId = "", teamMode = "solo", limit = 9 } = {}) {
<section class="mhos-tool-drawer-card" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="AI prompt tool setup">
<button class="mhos-tool-drawer-close" type="button" data-aicmd-tool-drawer-close aria-label="Close tool drawer">×</button>
Choose the output, trusted context, and destination workspace before preparing a review-only composer prompt.
placeholder="Example: use the selected Library source for facts only, avoid unsupported claims..."
Choose output, source context, destination handoff, language, and tone.

Preparation-only: this drawer creates a composer-ready instruction. Destination choices open or frame handoff context only; they do not publish, send, approve, route externally, create CRM records, run workflows, or mutate backend data.
export function renderAiToolDock({ projectName = "", specialistId = "", teamMode = "solo", escapeHtml }) {
const label = teamMode === "team" ? "Team guided tools" : "Specialist guided tools";
Guided setup · output, source, destination, then use in composer
"- Do not invent certifications, claims, ingredients, prices, guarantees, or statistics without source evidence."
const output = getSelectedLabel(drawer, "[data-aicmd-tool-drawer-output-select]", "Auto / infer from request");
const source = getSelectedLabel(drawer, "[data-aicmd-tool-drawer-source-select]", "Current chat or ask if source is needed");
: `${source}. If the selected source is not available in the current context, ask me to choose, paste, upload, or open the relevant source before producing final content.`;
`Use the ${title} tool for the active project${projectName ? ` (${projectName})` : ""}.`,
"Use only the available context and selected source details.",
"- Do not publish, send, route, save, overwrite, create CRM records, or run workflows.",
"- Do not make unsupported claims. Mark missing proof clearly."
function openToolDrawer({ drawer, btn, tool: explicitTool = null, text, input, session, projectName, persistSessionDraft, sessionKey, updateStatus }) {

`Prepare a structured prompt for ${btn.getAttribute("data-aicmd-tool-dock-label") || "this tool"}. Choose output, trusted context, destination handoff, language, and tone before loading it into the composer.`
updateStatus?.(`${btn.getAttribute("data-aicmd-tool-dock-label") || "Prompt tool"} setup opened. Review source and handoff requirements, then prepare the prompt.`);
updateStatus?.("Library guide opened. Select an asset, click Use as Source in AI Command, then return to AI Command.");
// Patch drawer population to apply source
updateStatus?.("This prompt tool needs a trusted Library source first. Choose one from Library before continuing.");
updateStatus(`${label} prompt prepared in the composer. Review it, then ask or create a preview.`);
// --- Ensure drawer is restored after navigation from Library ---
